meaning: n.<法>(具有自己独特风格的)电影导演
examples: I believe this is an auteur principle and one I stand by.
Could this fate befall James Cameron, Hollywood's most daring and extravagant auteur?
Pixar auteur Brad Byrd swaps in live action for animation to direct Tom Cruise in a fourth Mission: Impossible movie.
Veteran US screenwriter William Goldman has been one of the auteur theory's harshest critics.
No half measures for this auteur--he's not just going to make an ill-conceived television special.
